description: Configuration for OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect (OIDC) API protection definitions and clients.

definitions.description: List of OIDC definitions to create.

clients.description: List of OIDC clients to create.

Definition.description: An API protection definition that defines OAuth/OIDC behavior.

name.description: A unique name for the API protection definition.

id.description: The id to assign to the new API protection definition. The value must be unique. If not provided a unique ID will be generated.

description.description: An optional description of the API protection definition.

grant_types.description: A list of supported authorization grant types. At least one must be specified.

tcm_behavior.description: Identifies the Trusted Client Manager behavior concerning trusted clients and consent.

access_token_lifetime.description: Validity of the access token, in seconds.

hash_secrets.description: Whether or not to use a one way hash on the client secret before storing. If set to true the secret can no longer be retrieved once it has been created. Use the client secret rotation API to update the secret and optionally keep the old secret active. Note that once hashSecrets is set to true, it cannot be changed.

max_active_secrets.description: The maximum number of secrets that can be active for a client at any given time. If not provided, the value will be set to 2. Valid values are in the range 1 to 10. Only valid when hashSecrets is true.

min_secret_len.description: The minimum number of characters that a client secret must contain. If not specified the value will be set to 40. A value of 0 means there is no minimum.

enforce_single_use_grant.description: True if all tokens of the authorization grant should be revoked after an access token is validated.

authorization_code_lifetime.description: Validity period, in seconds, of the authorization code.

issue_refresh_token.description: True if a refresh token should be issued to the client.

max_authorization_grant_lifetime.description: The maximum duration of a grant, in seconds.

single_token_per_grant.description: True if previously granted access tokens should be revoked after a new access token is generated.

multiple_refresh_tokens.description: True if multiple refresh tokens are stored.

pin_policy.description: True if the refresh token will be further protected with a PIN.

token_char_set.description: String of characters that can be used to generate tokens.

oidc.description: The OIDC configuration for this API protection definition.

access_policy.description: The name of access policy assigned to this definition.

attribute_sources.description: Array of configured attribute sources to use in id_token generation and userinfo requests.

pre_token_mapping_rule.description: Path to file to upload as JavaScript pre-token rule.

post_token_mapping_rule.description: Path to file to upload as JavaScript post-token rule.

OIDC.description: OpenID Connect configuration for an API protection definition.

iss.description: The issuer identifier of this definition. Should have the prefix https://.

poc.description: The Point of Contact URL for this definition, must be a valid URL.

lifetime.description: The lifetime of the id_tokens issued.

alg.description: The signing algorithm for the JWT.

db.description: The database containing the signing key for RS/ES signing methods.

cert.description: The certificate label of the signing key for RS/ES signing methods.

dynamic_clients.description: Whether or not the client registration endpoint will be enabled for this definition.

issue_secret.description: Whether or not a client secret will be issued to dynamic clients.

oidc_compliant.description: Whether or not the definition should be strictly OIDC Compliant.

fapi_compliant.description: Whether or not the definition should be strictly FAPI Compliant. Setting this to true will automatically set OIDC Compliant to true.

enabled.description: Is encryption enabled for this definition.

alg.description: The key agreement algorithm for encryption.

AttributeSource.description: An attribute source mapping for token generation.

name.description: Name the attribute should be exposed as.

source.description: Reference to the attribute source which should be used to retrieve the value.

name.description: A meaningful name to identify this API protection client.

definition.description: The name of the related API protection definition which owns and defines this client.

redirect_uri.description: The redirect URIs to use for this client.

company_name.description: Name of the company associated with this client.

company_url.description: URL for the company associated with this client.

contact_person.description: Name of the contact person for this client.

email.description: The email address of the contact person for this client.

phone.description: The telephone number of the contact person for this client. Input must be completely numeric.

other_info.description: Other information about the client contact.

client_id.description: A unique OAUTH client identifier to identify this client to the authorization server.

client_secret.description: A string that identifies this client as confidential and serves as this client's secret.

require_pkce.description: Whether or not this client must perform proof of key exchange when performing an authorization code flow.

encryption_db.description: The database containing the JWT encryption key.

encryption_cert.description: The certificate label of the JWT encryption key.

jwks_uri.description: URI which is the location that a clients published JWK set.

introspect_with_secret.description: Does this client require a client secret when introspecting.

ext_properties.description: Dynamic Client information. This is free form JSON.

definitions.name: Verify Demo - Client Credentials Authorization Code Consent PSD2
definitions.description: For Fintechs, this is Client Credentials and Authorization Code with consent.

definitions.name: Verify Demo - Client Credentials AaaS
definitions.description: This is for the AaaS mock server access.
